response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a highly experienced full-stack engineer with 15+ years of professional development, strong TypeScript and Node.js proficiency, and directly relevant AI agent and MCP framework experience in his current Staff Engineer role at re:cinq. His background spans the required databases (MongoDB, MySQL), cloud tooling (AWS CDK), containerization (Docker/Kubernetes), and a deep testing culture evidenced by TDD advocacy, testing workshops, and open-source testing libraries. The primary gaps are the absence of Nest.js (the core backend framework), Vitest, Kotlin, and Playwright in his listed experience, and React appears secondary to Ember.js across much of his career. These are learnable gaps for a candidate of this seniority, and the AI agent work is a meaningful differentiator.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience with TypeScript and Node.js as primary tools, directly matching the core stack
Active AI agent and MCP framework development at current role, satisfying the increasingly important AI agent requirement
Demonstrated deep testing culture: TDD practitioner, open-source testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and organized testing workshops
concerns: Nest.js is entirely absent from the resume, despite being the primary backend framework for this role
Kotlin is not listed anywhere; Java appears only in older embedded/robotic-arm contexts, not in modern backend services
React experience is limited to one role (Optilyz); the majority of frontend history is Ember.js, which may indicate a shallower React depth than required
